alternative_parents.description: Thioester derivatives of a fatty acid with the general formula RC(=O)SR', where R is the fatty acyl chain.
alternative_parents.name: Fatty acyl thioesters

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an ester of thiocarboxylic acid, with the general structure RC(=S)XR' (R=H, alkyl, aryl; R'=alkyl, aryl; X=O,S).
alternative_parents.name: Thioesters

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a silicon atom covalently bonded to an alkoxy group. They have the general formula R1R2R3Si-O-R4 (R4 = aryl, alkyl).
alternative_parents.name: Silyl ethers

alternative_parents.description: Ester derivatives of carbothioic S-acids, with the general structure RSC(=O)R' where R = organyl group and R' = H or organyl group.
alternative_parents.name: Carbothioic S-esters

alternative_parents.description: Organosulfur compounds a sulfenyl group with the general formula RS (R = organyl).
alternative_parents.name: Sulfenyl compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organosilicon compounds where the tetravalent silicon atom is linked to one or more heteroatoms.
alternative_parents.name: Organoheterosilanes

alternative_parents.description: Organic salt compounds containing a metalloid atom in its ionic form.
alternative_parents.name: Organic metalloid salts

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a carboxylic acid group with the formula -C(=O)OH or a derivative thereof.
alternative_parents.name: Carboxylic acids and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a carbonyl group, with the general structure RC(=O)R', where R=organyl, R'=H, N, O, organyl group or halide group.
alternative_parents.name: Carbonyl compounds

class.description: Organic compounds containing a metalloid atom.
class.name: Organometalloid compounds

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as trialkoxysilanes. These are organosilicon compounds with the general formula RO[Si](R')(OR'')OR''' (R-R''' = aliphatic organyl group).

direct_parent.description: Organosilicon compounds with the general formula RO[Si](R')(OR'')OR''' (R-R''' = aliphatic organyl group).
direct_parent.name: Trialkoxysilanes

intermediate_nodes.description: Organosilicon compounds with the general formula RO[Si](OR')(R'')(R''') (R,R' = organyl; R'',R''' = any atom).
intermediate_nodes.name: Alkoxysilanes

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic compounds containing a C[Si] bond.
subclass.name: Organosilicon compounds

superclass.description: Organic compounds containing a bond between a carbon atom and metal atom.
superclass.name: Organometallic compounds
